applicability_notes: torch_pattern_notes: dim defaults to -1 when not provided; operates in-place on the ttnn side (input buffer reused), replacing the single torch softmax node. Commonly appears in the attention subsequence scale -> mask-add -> softmax -> matmul(V), where it replaces torch.nn.functional.softmax(attention_scores, dim=-1).; fusion_notes: In-place variant requires input layout TILE; when input is height-sharded the sharded program config block_h/block_w must match the input shard spec tiles exactly (shard_shape // 32).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [batch*heads, seq, seq] attention score matrix, height-sharded across cores

memory_config.shard_spec_template: shard_shape=[{TILES_PER_CORE_M}*32, {SEQ}] inherited in-place from producer (mul/bcast scale op)

placement_observations.source: model call site: attention block, attention_probs = ttnn.softmax_in_place(attention_scores, program_config=config.program_configs['softmax_program_config']) followed by ttnn.matmul(..., memory_config=ttnn.L1_HEIGHT_SHARDED_MEMORY_CONFIG)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: per-slice attention scores [1, 1, seq_len_slice, key_len], height-sharded; used when full scores too large for L1
placement_observations.source: model call site: time-sliced attention (tsa_softmax program config inside slice loop over j, i)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: large unsliced attention weights [1, num_heads (e.g. 71), seq_len, seq_len]

condition.value: shardable_threshold (reference/full-tensor path keeps scores DRAM interleaved)

placement_observations.source: test/reference call site: attn_weights = ttnn.add(..., memory_config=dram_interleaved_memory_config); ttnn.softmax_in_place(attn_weights, compute_kernel_config=compute_kernel_config)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: tiled input tensor, memory config parameterized by test

memory_config.layout: TILE (sharded or interleaved per mem_config param)

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.Layout.TILE, memory_config=mem_config); ttnn.softmax_in_place(input, program_config=softmax_program_config)
